title: Part Feeding Wizard Avoid Hand Interference
description:
Part Feeding Wizard Avoid Hand Interference

Avoid Hand Interference

This screen is used to configure Avoid Hand Interference settings.

Item	Description

Avoid interference with robot hand	Select this check box to enable a function used to avoid interference between the end effector and the platform.

Hand Clearance Radius	Parts within this distance from the circumference of the platform (set in the vision search window) will not be included in the coordinates queue.

Units are in mm.
